metadata.description: Kanban board for Stripe Subscription Billing Management. Contains original epic task (as reference) and broken-down subtasks (1-2 day units). See ../KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md for breakdown details.
metadata.note: This file contains the original epic task. Broken-down subtasks should be added based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md

tasks.title: Stripe Subscription Billing Management
tasks.description: Implement subscription billing through Stripe including subscription creation, tier management, billing cycle handling, and automatic renewals.
tasks.userStory: As a store owner, I want my subscription to be automatically billed so that I don't have to manually manage payments and my service continues uninterrupted.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a store owner completes trial, when trial ends, then Stripe automatically creates a subscription and charges the payment method on file
Given a subscription is active, when the billing cycle date arrives, then Stripe automatically charges the payment method and subscription continues
Given a subscription payment fails, when Stripe retries fail, then the subscription is marked as past_due and the store owner is notified
Given a store owner upgrades/downgrades subscription, when the change is processed, then prorated billing is calculated and applied correctly
Given a subscription is cancelled, when the current billing period ends, then access is maintained until period end and then revoked
Given subscription events occur, when Stripe sends webhooks, then the system processes them correctly and updates subscription status
tasks.businessValue: Automates revenue collection and reduces manual billing overhead. Ensures consistent cash flow.
tasks.technicalNotes: Implement Stripe webhook handlers for subscription.created, subscription.updated, invoice.payment_succeeded, invoice.payment_failed. Handle idempotency. Store subscription status in database.
successMetrics: Successful billing rate: 95%+ of billing attempts succeed
Payment failure recovery rate: 70%+ of failed payments are recovered within 7 days
businessRules: Prorated billing applies when changing tiers mid-cycle
Failed payments trigger 3 retry attempts over 7 days
Subscription access is revoked 7 days after final payment failure
tasks.note: This is the original epic task. The subtasks should be broken down into 1-2 day units based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md
